name: 01 Mar 26 - (5-26PM) Week 10
content:
It's a new month. I can't believe this. I have spent the weekend sewing and I had the best time. 
I also have made progress on the [[Pants no 1]]. I am using the [[Green corduroy]] and i'm pleased with how it does not require any ironing. I like the final fit too! 
I can see myself wearing it to death!!
